_comment: agentic-gates slice of the marketing CTA source (canonical file lives in the internal marketing repo, docs/marketing/cta.json — keep in sync, agentic-gates entries ONLY; entries for other products must never appear here, see the separation rules in README.md). agentic-gates.cta_text: The full gate suite — pro gates wired into your CI, plus the complete case study with logs — is currently in closed beta. Want in? Become a beta tester
